## What this PR does

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## How it was tested

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` compiles without errors
- [ ] Tested with a screen reader (name and version: ___)
- [ ] Tested in Chrome on claude.ai (for Chrome extension changes)
- [ ] Tested in VS Code Extension Development Host (for VS Code extension changes)
- [ ] Tested with `claude-sr` in the terminal (for CLI changes)

If you do not have access to a screen reader, note that here. Someone else can test before merge.

## Screen reader behavior (if applicable)

Describe what a screen reader announces before and after this change.

## Accessibility checklist

- [ ] No emoji in code, comments, or documentation
- [ ] No ASCII art or decorative characters
- [ ] No markdown tables in documentation
- [ ] Link text is descriptive (not "click here")
- [ ] ARIA attributes are valid
- [ ] Focus styles are visible and high contrast
